name: Use of Multiple Resources with Duplicate Identifier
description: The product uses multiple resources that share the same identifier in a context requiring unique identifiers. This can cause the product to operate on the wrong resource, allowing attackers to create duplicate identifiers to redirect operations to attacker-controlled resources.
detection_pattern: Multiple STORAGE or STRUCTURAL nodes share the same identifier in META[resource_id], and TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes reference the identifier without CONTROL[uniqueness_check] to disambiguate which resource is targeted
